name: Clay
description:
A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Clay (clay.earth). Search your email, calendar, Twitter / X, Linkedin, iMessage, Facebook, and WhatsApp contacts. Take notes, set reminders, and more.

Examples

    "Who in my network works at Google as a Product Manager?"
    "Who is John Smith?"
    "Add a new contact named Jane Doe, who is a Designer at Figma."
    "Save a note for John Smith: 'Follow up about the Q2 report.'"
    "Create a group called 'Investors 2025.'"
